privileged_info_summary: The ReqView ExampleProject contains an SRS.json file with specific requirement items that the user must verify. SRS-61 defines creating a document template, SRS-72 defines importing an MS Word document, and SRS-76 defines exporting to HTML. The target document for new test cases is TESTS, which currently contains exactly 23 baseline items. The required expected headers and text matches in the metadata accurately reflect the corresponding SRS item definitions.
